overview.description: The State Street My2031 Corporate Bond ETF (MYCK) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is an actively managed fund of investment grade corporate bonds with effective maturities in 2031. Bonds are USD-denominated. MYCK was launched on Sep 23, 2024 and is issued by State Street.
